name: Amentum Holdings, Inc.
description: Amentum Holdings, Inc. is a leading global provider of engineering, project management, and solutions integration services. The company serves the U.S. federal government, allied governments, and commercial clients across various sectors, including defense, space, intelligence, environment, and energy. Amentum specializes in delivering advanced technology solutions, modernizing infrastructure, and managing complex operations to address critical national security and mission-critical challenges worldwide.
